creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Modified description:

* To text suggested by Wayne, and matching the exactly field name
* Added minor html formatting to ease readability, and bolden

Also modified description for Ports Framework (now that i know basic formatting is doable) to:

Make it clearer that "Ports Framework" issues are only for issues in certain /usr/ports/ paths.

Thank you for the report Wayne, we appreciate and welcome any more ideas, feedback and suggestions around improving the new user (or not veteran user) experience by making things more obvious & intuitive.
